description: Ranks brands by braked towing capacity as a percentage of kerbweight for registered passenger cars. Filters to valid towing (1–5000 kg) and kerbweight (300–5000 kg). Requires at least 100 qualifying cars per brand. Use for towing-to-weight ratio or practical towing capability questions.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | EVAL tow = CASE(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTilkoblingsvaegtMedBremser > 0 AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTilkoblingsvaegtMedBremser <= 5000, KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTilkoblingsvaegtMedBremser, NULL), kerb = CASE(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningKoereklarVaegtMinimum >= 300 AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningKoereklarVaegtMinimum <= 5000, KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningKoereklarVaegtMinimum, NULL) | WHERE tow IS NOT NULL AND kerb IS NOT NULL | STATS tow_capable_cars = COUNT(*), avg_towing_kg = ROUND(AVG(tow), 0), avg_kerb_kg = ROUND(AVG(kerb), 0), avg_tow_to_kerb_pct = ROUND(AVG(tow * 100.0 / kerb), 1) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE tow_capable_cars >= 100 | SORT avg_tow_to_kerb_pct DESC | LIMIT 30
